name: Fulcrum Academy
description: Neutral, academic institution with a focus on technological research and training of elite airship crews
mission: To maintain a state of technological parity and prevent catastrophic conflict through the training of elite airship crews and strategic dissemination of knowledge

schools.name: Whisperer Wing
schools.description: Mastery of the unseen, focusing on emotional regulation and manipulation
schools.core_competency: Systematic regulation of crew morale and emotional response
schools.consequence_of_failure: Crew panic and decreased operational cohesion

schools.name: Aether-Wrights' Forge
schools.description: Training of hyper-specialized engineers focused on the maintenance and operation of Aetheric-Reaction Engines
schools.core_competency: Calibration of sigil-paste conduits, maintenance of Volatile Aether fluid, and monitoring of Dragonstone battery
schools.consequence_of_failure: Reality-bending failure, including localized gravity flipping, petrification, or uncontrolled chaos

schools.name: Navigator's Art
schools.description: Training of navigators focused on charting courses and navigating the unknowable forces that govern the skies
schools.core_competency: Reading of jitter vibrations to sense danger and type of chaos ahead
schools.consequence_of_failure: Loss of situational awareness and increased risk of disaster

red_sash.description: Pinnacle of aerial supremacy, formed by the top graduates of the Whisperer, Aether-Wright, and Navigator schools
red_sash.core_competency: Operational harmony, technical mastery, navigational genius, and psychological stability
red_sash.consequence_of_failure: Suicidal missions and increased risk of disaster

influence: Quiet, unseen hand on the tiller, controlling technological and political currents in the Shattered World
